recommendations.title: Amsterdam
recommendations.overview: In the 1930s, three friends—a doctor, a nurse, and an attorney—witness a murder, become suspects themselves and uncover one of the most outrageous plots in American history.

recommendations.title: My Best Friend's Exorcism
recommendations.overview: The year is 1988. Abby and Gretchen have been best friends since fourth grade. After an evening of skinny-dipping goes disastrously wrong, Gretchen begins to act…different, which leads Abby to suspect her best friend may be possessed by a demon. With

recommendations.title: The Devil All the Time
recommendations.overview: In Knockemstiff, Ohio and its neighboring backwoods, sinister characters converge around young Arvin Russell as he fights the evil forces that threaten him and his family.

recommendations.title: Painless
recommendations.overview: While searching for a solution to his serious health condition, David, a renowned neurosurgeon, discovers a sinister secret hidden in the past.

recommendations.title: Joy
recommendations.overview: A story based on the life of a struggling Long Island single mom who became one of the country's most successful entrepreneurs.

recommendations.title: A Good Marriage
recommendations.overview: After 25 years of a good marriage, what will Darcy do once she discovers her husband's sinister secret?

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.

recommendations.title: Deep Cover
recommendations.overview: Black police officer Russell Stevens applies for a special anti-drug squad which targets the highest boss of cocaine delivery to LA—the Colombian foreign minister's nephew. Russell works his way up from the bottom undercover, until he reaches the bos

recommendations.title: The Seventh Sign
recommendations.overview: Abby is a pregnant woman with a curious new boarder in the apartment over her garage. Turns out he's heaven-sent and is speeding along the Apocalypse by bloodying rivers, egging on plagues and following scripture word for word.

recommendations.title: American Hustle
recommendations.overview: A conman and his seductive partner are forced to work for a wild FBI agent, who pushes them into a world of Jersey power-brokers and the Mafia.
